statement: Materializing an approved OpportunityContract into a build packet writes a product-design-contract the frontend planner accepts, preserving the decided fields and protected decisions (primaryUser, primaryJob, and permissionBoundaries pinned to the nodekit authority; finalVerdict to the nodeproof authority) and the read-only Atlas query, so the Build stage cannot re-decide scope; and a packet name that could escape the packet directory is refused before any write.

surfaces: Decide to Build seam, build packet materialization, frontend planner intake
